description: Structural-element property keyword reference for FLAC support and reinforcement models.

items.name: cable
items.description: Cable element material, grout, sliding, yield, thermal, and 2D spacing properties.
items.common_use: Rock bolts, cable bolts, tendons, and reinforcement with axial behavior.

items.name: beam-pile
items.description: Beam-type and pile property groups including elastic section properties and pile coupling springs.
items.common_use: Beams, piles, struts, and flexural support members.

items.name: liner
items.description: FLAC2D liner properties (section + double-sided coupling springs). Shell and geogrid types are FLAC3D-only and noted here.
items.common_use: Tunnel linings, shotcrete, embedded membranes (FLAC2D). Use FLAC3D docs for shell/geogrid types.

items.name: link
items.description: Structural link per-DOF property selectors (x / y / rotation in FLAC2D) plus attachment concepts.
items.common_use: Control how structural nodes interact with zones or other structural objects.

notes: Property keyword sets are binary-validated against FLAC2D 9.0 (probed via 'structure <type> property ?').
'shell' and 'geogrid' are FLAC3D-only structure types — rejected by FLAC2D 9.0. They are documented inline in liner.json under 'related_3d_only'.
